results.rendered_html:
pāṃsana 1〉 adj. am Ende eines comp. besudelnd, verunehrend; = dūṣaka  TRIK. 3,1,10 . kula˚  HIḌ. 1,39 .  MBH. 5,2733 . 7,9141  (˚pāśana, sic).  R. 2,82,13 . 3,51,25 . kṣatriya˚ 1,56,4  (˚pāṃśana). 3,40,16 . rākṣasa˚  HIḌ. 4,12 . vṛṣṇi˚ (so ist zu lesen)  MBH. 7,6736 . f. īḥ kula˚  HARIV. 4619 .  DAŚ. 2,71 .  R. 2,30,7 . 37,21 . 48,20 .  R. GORR. 2,45,26 . ā (wohl fehlerhaft)  MBH. 3,15978 .  R. GORR. 2,37,18 . 76,3 .
— 2〉 n. = avajñā Verachtung  TRIK. 1,1,127 . — Der Form nach ein nom. ag. oder act. von pāṃsay, [Page4-0620] welches zu pāṃsu gehört.

results.rendered_html:
pāṃsa(śa)na a. (nā or nī f.) (Usually at the end of comp.)
1 Disgracing, dishonouring, defiling; paulastyakulapāṃsana  Mv. 5. 
2 Vitiating
(pb) spoiling.
3 Wicked, contemptible.
4 Infamous.
— naṃ Contempt.
